overview: Refactor cluster topology retrieval into the nested `c8volt get cluster topology` hierarchy, preserve `c8volt get cluster-topology` as a quiet compatibility path, and prove the migration through command tests plus synchronized help and documentation updates.

userStories.title: Establish the shared cluster command structure
userStories.description: Introduce the `get cluster` parent command and stabilize a shared topology execution path so later command entries reuse existing behavior instead of duplicating it.
acceptanceCriteria: A `cluster` command exists beneath `get` in the Cobra tree.
The topology command logic is routed through one shared execution path rather than separate duplicated implementations.
Foundational command-tree tests cover `get` and `get cluster` help behavior.
userStories.notes: Reuse existing Cobra command patterns in `cmd/`. Keep this slice limited to parent-command wiring, shared execution setup, and baseline help coverage.

userStories.title: Deliver the preferred nested topology command
userStories.description: Expose topology retrieval at `c8volt get cluster topology` while preserving the current output, failure behavior, exit semantics, and inherited flags from the existing command.
acceptanceCriteria: `c8volt get cluster topology` is available under the new `get cluster` hierarchy.
Running the nested command yields the same observable topology output and failure semantics as the prior behavior.
Command tests cover successful and failing nested-command execution.
userStories.notes: Keep the implementation bounded to command wiring in `cmd/`; do not change the underlying cluster service behavior.

userStories.title: Preserve the legacy cluster-topology compatibility path
userStories.description: Keep `c8volt get cluster-topology` working during the deprecation period by routing it through the shared topology behavior and documenting deprecation only in help-oriented surfaces.
acceptanceCriteria: `c8volt get cluster-topology` continues to execute successfully during the migration period.
The legacy path produces the same observable behavior as `c8volt get cluster topology`.
The legacy path does not emit a runtime deprecation warning.
userStories.notes: Preserve or explicitly review existing legacy aliases such as `ct`, `cluster-info`, and `ci`. Keep deprecation messaging out of runtime output.

userStories.title: Make the new hierarchy discoverable and validate completion
userStories.description: Update help-facing documentation to prefer the nested command path, mark the legacy path as deprecated but supported, regenerate CLI docs, and run the repository validation flow.
acceptanceCriteria: `c8volt get` help exposes `cluster`, and `c8volt get cluster` help exposes `topology`.
README examples and generated CLI docs prefer `c8volt get cluster topology` and mark `c8volt get cluster-topology` as deprecated but supported.
Validation includes targeted command tests, relevant cluster regression checks, regenerated docs, and a successful `make test` run.
userStories.notes: Update source docs such as `README.md`, `docs/index.md`, and `docs/cli/` files, then regenerate derived CLI documentation instead of editing generated site output directly.
